case_title: MARLYNNE SACCARO VS. PAUL REVERE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT AMICA LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND FOR FAILURE TO BRING WITHIN STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AND BECAUSE NO PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION UNDER INSURANCE CODE 790.03 OR CAUSE OF ACTION 7. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2007 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean P. Nalty of Kelly Herlihy & Klein, LLP, 951-0535, appearing for defendants and moving parties
Kelly Cowan, 392-4660, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS PAUL REVERE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY and UNUMPROVIDENT CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF MARYLYNNE SACCARO'S 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th, 7th Causes of Action is sustained without leave to amend for failure to bring within statute of limitations and because insurance is not a "good" or "service" for purposes of Cause of Action 6. Insurance code 790.03 does not provide a private right of action for Cause of Action 7. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
S. Fey Epling of Drinker Biddle & Reath, LLP, 591-7500, appearing for defendant and moving party
Kelly Cowan, 392-4660, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT AMICA LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend for failure to bring within statute of limitations and because no private right of action under Insurance Code 790.03 or Cause of Action 7. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
